notes: with_skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 3 evals (33/33 assertions)
without_skill averages 36% (12/33) — main gaps: no structured KWCAG/SEO/WP checklists, no Korean output, no standard sections
The biggest differentiator is structured coverage: skill always produces Section A (접근성) + Section B (SEO & WP) with full item checklists
Non-discriminating assertions: file generation (HTML/CSV) and file/line references — both configs always pass these
Trade-off: skill costs ~4.4x tokens (72K vs 16K) and ~2.6x time (274s vs 104s)
